summary: Digitized PAC insertion waveforms (RA, RV, PA, PAWP only — no ECG or ABP)

source.attribution: Waveforms digitized via WebPlotDigitizer from a UCHealth (University of Colorado Health) PAC insertion teaching slide. Used with permission for educational purposes.
source.method: WebPlotDigitizer v4, resampled to 125 Hz via PCHIP interpolation. See tools/build_powerpoint_patient.py.
